page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.6xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a base clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance features 24 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped directly to 24 physical cores with a single thread per core configuration, eliminating hyper-threading overhead. It is equipped with 96.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating systems and application data. Network connectivity is supported by an 18 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The absence of integrated GPUs and local NVMe storage positions this server as a CPU-focused resource. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated physical core allocation offers predictable compute performance without resource contention, making it a stable choice for workloads requiring consistent CPU execution.

The ecs.hfg9i.6xlarge is suited for general-purpose workloads, application servers, build systems, and medium-scale databases that benefit from high clock speeds and dedicated CPU cores but do not require local high-speed storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.6xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance configured with 24 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores, running on an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor at 3.4 GHz. It features 96.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 4.0 GB per core ratio, and operates under the KVM hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering an 18 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. With its dedicated, non-hyperthreaded CPU allocation, it delivers highly predictable compute performance. This configuration is suitable for general-purpose applications, web serving, build environments, and application servers requiring consistent CPU performance without resource sharing.
